_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to design architectures and frameworks.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to make defensible architectural decisions under uncertainty, documenting the rationale, rejected alternatives, and conditions that would trigger re-evaluation.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-013 (AI, cosine: 0.542), TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.529).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.514). Shared vocabulary: [ability]. DCWF-only terms [architectures, design, frameworks] vs WIDAI-only terms [alternatives, architectural, conditions, decisions, defensible, documenting] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.918, R=0.844). P exceeds R by 0.075 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ability to design architectures and frameworks." and "Ability to make defensible architectural decisions under uncertainty, documentin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.599 > STS 0.514 (gap +0.085). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ability] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.0%. Shared tokens: [ability]. DCWF-only: [architectures, design, frameworks]. WIDAI-only: [alternatives, architectural, conditions, decisions, defensible, documenting].

signals.detail: STS 0.514 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
